button.name: action_insurance_invoice
button.invisible: state not in ['confirmed'] or invoice_id != False or premium_type == 'installment'

button.name: action_create_emi_installment
button.invisible: state not in ['confirmed'] or instalment_complete != False or premium_type == 'fixed'

button.name: action_create_agent_bill
button.invisible: state == 'draft' or agent_required == False or agent_bill_id != False

button.name: confirmed_to_running
button.invisible: instalment_complete == False or state not in ['confirmed']

button.name: %(action_re_insurance_contract)d
button.invisible: state not in ['confirmed', 'running'] or is_reinsurance_required == False or re_insurance_id != False

button.name: %(action_renew_insurance)d
button.invisible: state not in ['expired'] or renew_insurance_id != False

field.name: agent_required
field.readonly: agent_bill_id != False or state not in 'draft'

field.name: agent_id
field.readonly: agent_bill_id != False or state not in 'draft'

div.h5: Business Type and Operations (for Business Liability Insurance)
Industry Specific Risks(Such as Malpractice Insurance for Healthcare Providers)

t.t: Huge file size. The image should be optimized/reduced.
Optimization required! Reduce the image size or increase your compression settings.
Huge file size. The image should be optimized/reduced.
Optimization required! Reduce the image size or increase your compression settings.
